topPrompts.prompt: Lone runner as a small dark figure sprinting through a vast concrete highway underpass at pre-dawn, rows of fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling creating symmetrical converging lines toward bright golden dawn light flooding through the far exit, wet concrete floor reflecting overhead lights in long streaks, graffiti-tagged concrete pillars on both sides, orange Alphafly shoes the only colour in the grey scene, breath condensing in freezing air, 35mm anamorphic lens with natural flare from the exit light, epic cinematic urban scale, Nike campaign photography

Tight portrait from the chest up of a young Black man with short locs and clear-frame glasses mid-run, face glistening with sweat, jaw set with effort, sodium streetlight from camera-left painting half his face amber and leaving the other half in deep shadow, black Dri-FIT half-zip collar visible, breath vapour trailing from his mouth into the cold pre-dawn air, blurred city lights in the far background as soft bokeh, shot on 85mm f/1.4 with razor-thin depth of field, intense athletic portrait, Nike campaign photography

Extreme low-angle close-up of Nike Alphafly NEXT% shoes in electric orange-volt with purple swoosh and rainbow gradient midsole mid-stride through a deep puddle on cracked wet asphalt, water exploding outward frozen in mid-splash, puddle surface reflecting a single amber streetlight and the dark silhouette of the runner above, black running tights visible above the ankles, shallow depth of field blurring background into warm bokeh circles, rain-slicked urban road texture, dynamic product photography, 85mm macro, Nike campaign photography

Runner sitting on raw concrete steps outside a brutalist stairwell at 5am, elbows on knees, head bowed, catching his breath after a hard effort, sweat visible on his forearms, black Dri-FIT half-zip unzipped slightly at the neck, electric orange Alphafly shoes planted on the wet step below, a single caged bulb above the doorway casting hard warm light and deep geometric shadows down the concrete, shot from a low angle looking slightly up at him, 35mm lens, quiet gritty moment of recovery, Nike campaign photography

Young Black man with short locs and clear-frame glasses, a small dark figure sprinting through a vast concrete highway underpass at pre-dawn in black Nike Dri-FIT half-zip and running tights, rows of fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling creating symmetrical converging lines toward bright golden dawn light flooding through the far exit, wet concrete floor reflecting overhead lights in long streaks, graffiti-tagged concrete pillars on both sides, electric orange-volt Alphafly NEXT% shoes the only colour in the grey scene, breath condensing in freezing air, 35mm anamorphic lens with natural flare from the exit light, epic cinematic urban scale, Nike campaign photography

Lone runner as a small dark figure sprinting through a vast concrete highway underpass at pre-dawn, rows of fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling creating symmetrical converging lines toward bright golden dawn light flooding through the far exit, wet concrete floor reflecting overhead lights in long streaks, graffiti-tagged concrete pillars on both sides, orange Alphafly shoes the only colour in the grey scene, breath condensing in freezing air, 35mm anamorphic lens with natural flare from the exit light, epic cinematic urban scale, Nike campaign photography

Tight portrait from the chest up of a young Black man with short locs and clear-frame glasses mid-run, face glistening with sweat, jaw set with effort, sodium streetlight from camera-left painting half his face amber and leaving the other half in deep shadow, black Dri-FIT half-zip collar visible, breath vapour trailing from his mouth into the cold pre-dawn air, blurred city lights in the far background as soft bokeh, shot on 85mm f/1.4 with razor-thin depth of field, intense athletic portrait, Nike campaign photography

Extreme low-angle close-up of Nike Alphafly NEXT% shoes in electric orange-volt with purple swoosh and rainbow gradient midsole mid-stride through a deep puddle on cracked wet asphalt, water exploding outward frozen in mid-splash, puddle surface reflecting a single amber streetlight and the dark silhouette of the runner above, black running tights visible above the ankles, shallow depth of field blurring background into warm bokeh circles, rain-slicked urban road texture, dynamic product photography, 85mm macro, Nike campaign photography

Runner sitting on raw concrete steps outside a brutalist stairwell at 5am, elbows on knees, head bowed, catching his breath after a hard effort, sweat visible on his forearms, black Dri-FIT half-zip unzipped slightly at the neck, electric orange Alphafly shoes planted on the wet step below, a single caged bulb above the doorway casting hard warm light and deep geometric shadows down the concrete, shot from a low angle looking slightly up at him, 35mm lens, quiet gritty moment of recovery, Nike campaign photography

Runner mid-stride at full speed on an empty rain-slicked city road at the moment of golden hour dawn, shot from behind at a low angle, the entire road stretching out ahead of him reflecting golden light, orange Alphafly shoes kicking up fine spray, black running kit silhouetted against the warm sky, long shadow racing ahead of him on the wet tarmac, 24mm ultra-wide creating dramatic perspective and speed, no other people, Nike campaign photography

Runner mid-stride on an empty industrial bridge at dawn, shot from low angle at knee height from the side with camera slightly ahead, runner moving right with open road stretching ahead of him, golden dawn sun at 8 o'clock behind him creating warm rim light on his silhouette and locs, steel bridge structure framing overhead, wet concrete deck reflecting amber light, breath vapour lit by backlight, orange Alphafly shoes mid-footstrike, 35mm f/2.8 environmental wide, Nike campaign photography

Young Black man with short locs and clear-frame glasses at full sprint, passing directly past the camera, shot from knee height with camera slightly ahead so he is approaching, jaw set with effort, forward lean, arms driving hard, sweat droplets on brow, single sodium streetlight at 8 o'clock behind him creating bright rim light on his outline and locs with deep shadow on near side, blurred city lights racing past as warm bokeh, orange Alphafly shoes frozen between strides, 85mm f/1.4 razor shallow focus on near eye, Nike campaign photography

Nike Alphafly NEXT% in electric orange-volt with purple swoosh and rainbow gradient midsole smashing through a deep rain puddle on cracked asphalt, massive water explosion frozen at peak radiating outward with individual droplets suspended, sodium streetlight at 10 o'clock reflected in puddle surface illuminating the rainbow midsole from below, dark silhouette of runner's legs above, second foot airborne behind, 85mm macro from ground level centimetres above asphalt, warm bokeh streetlights in background, Nike campaign photography

Runner mid-stride across a vast empty brutalist concrete plaza, low angle at knee height, harsh midday sun directly overhead casting a precise hard black shadow of the running figure diagonally across pale concrete, shadow stretching long across geometric expansion joints in the slab, raw concrete surface bleached by sun, electric orange Alphafly mid-footstrike against pale concrete, runner in black Dri-FIT, clean white sky at upper edge of frame, 35mm f/2.8 environmental wide, Nike campaign photography

Looking straight down from directly above a wide brutalist concrete staircase, runner ascending steps viewed from overhead, short locs visible from above, black Nike half-zip and tights, electric orange Alphafly on each step creating colour pop against grey concrete, each step casting a sharp geometric shadow on the step below, runner centred in the stair geometry, midday sun creating minimal shadow directly beneath, 35mm overhead looking straight down, Nike campaign photography

Ground level centimetres above smooth pale concrete — Nike Alphafly NEXT% in electric orange-volt and rainbow gradient midsole in full light, runner's hard black shadow of torso and legs falling diagonally across the shoe from afternoon sun at 2 o'clock, shoe beside its own cast shadow, orange upper in direct sunlight against cool concrete grey, 85mm macro shallow focus, no person visible — only shoe and the geometry of shadow falling across it, Nike campaign photography

Runner at full sprint coming directly toward camera on a long empty athletics track, ground level at track surface, midday sun at 1 o'clock slightly right behind runner creating sharp white rim light on right shoulder and locs, long pale concrete track with painted white lane lines converging as leading lines toward camera, runner's hard shadow racing ahead of them toward lens, electric orange Alphafly visible at foot level, clean saturated blue sky above, 24mm ultra-wide extreme low angle, Nike campaign photography

Young Black man with short locs and clear-frame glasses sitting on the edge of a brutalist concrete step, elbows resting on knees, head bowed looking down at his electric orange Alphafly shoes, black Nike Dri-FIT half-zip and black running tights, harsh midday sun from directly above casting a hard compressed shadow beneath him on pale concrete, shot from below at foot level looking up with concrete staircase geometry receding above, 50mm f/2.0, quiet pre-race moment, Nike campaign photography

Ground level centimetres above smooth pale concrete — Nike Alphafly NEXT% in electric orange-volt and rainbow gradient midsole in full direct sunlight, hard black shadow of an unseen figure falling diagonally across the shoe from sun at 2 o'clock, orange upper saturated against chalk-grey concrete, geometric expansion joint bisecting the slab behind, no person visible — only the shoe and the architecture of shadow, 85mm macro f/1.4 shallow focus, Nike campaign product photography

Young Black man with short locs and clear-frame glasses crouched in a sprinter's set position on a pale concrete athletics track, hands planted on the lane line, black Nike Dri-FIT half-zip and black running tights, electric orange Alphafly shoes sharp at foreground, white painted lane lines converging as leading lines to vanishing point behind him, harsh midday sun at 1 o'clock throwing a hard shadow beneath his body across the pale track surface, 24mm f/4 from track level, pre-race tension, clean blue sky above, Nike campaign photography

Panning blur action shot — runner in black Nike Dri-FIT half-zip and black running tights mid-stride on wet mountain road, camera tracking at runner's speed so he is relatively sharp while misty peaks, grey sky and roadside vegetation smear into horizontal streaks, electric orange Alphafly shoes bright against dark wet asphalt, rain falling, cool overcast sidelight from camera-left, 35mm f/2.8

Ground-level close-up of Nike Alphafly Zoom X shoe on wet dark mountain asphalt, rain droplets beading on electric orange upper, rainbow midsole catching the grey overcast light, small puddle beside the shoe reflecting pale sky, no person visible — only the shoe and the rain, 85mm macro f/1.4 razor-thin focus

Runner standing at edge of wet mountain road, back fully to camera, black kit against grey mist, electric orange Alphafly shoes the only warm colour at the bottom of the frame, looking out over vast grey misty valley, pale peaks disappearing into low cloud, small dark figure against enormous landscape, 50mm f/4, cool flat overcast light

Runner in black Nike Dri-FIT half-zip and black running tights mid-stride on wet granite dock paving, glass office towers and grey sky behind him, metal railings and dark canal water to one side, electric orange Alphafly shoes bright against wet dark stone, rain falling, cool flat overcast light from above, 35mm f/2.8 environmental wide, motion slight but not blurred

Young Black man with short locs leaning forearms on a metal dock railing, looking down at the grey canal water below, black Nike Dri-FIT half-zip and black running tights, electric orange Alphafly shoes on wet granite beneath him, glass office towers reflected in the water behind, rain on shoulders, 85mm f/1.8 from side angle, cool flat overcast light, post-run stillness

Ground-level close-up of Nike Alphafly Zoom X shoe on wet dark granite dock paving, rain droplets beading on electric orange Flyknit upper, rainbow gradient midsole in violet-coral-lime reflecting overcast sky, puddle beside the outsole reflecting glass tower windows, no person visible — only the shoe and wet stone, 85mm macro f/1.4 razor-thin focus

Young Black man with short locs standing with back to camera, one hand resting on metal dock railing, looking out over grey canal water toward glass office towers disappearing into low cloud, black kit against the grey city, electric orange Alphafly shoes the only warm colour at the bottom of frame, 50mm f/4, cool flat overcast light from above, total stillness

Low angle from wet granite paving looking up — runner in black Nike Dri-FIT and black tights mid-stride past camera, electric orange Alphafly shoes sharp at lower frame, glass towers and grey overcast sky above, metal railings and canal water receding behind, rain falling, 24mm wide from near-ground level, cool flat overcast light
